title: becium schweinfurthii
intro: Becium schweinfurthii, also known as Pygmy tea bush or African blue basil, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, native to East Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing stress and improving digestion. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Becium schweinfurthii involve infusing its leaves in hot water to make a tea or using it in cooking to add flavor and nutritional value. The plant's essential oil is also extracted and used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
